mapper.insert: insert into COTDL.tbl_piisteptableupdate (jobid, version, stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3, column_name, update_val, status) values (#{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{stepid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq1, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq2, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{seq3, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{column_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{update_val, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.delete: delete from cotdl.tbl_piisteptableupdate where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
delete from cotdl.tbl_piisteptableupdate where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and stepid= #{stepid}
mapper.insert: insert into cotdl.tbl_piisteptableupdate select jobid, cast(version as INTEGER)+1 , stepid, seq1, seq2, seq3, column_name, update_val, status from cotdl.tbl_piisteptableupdate where jobid= #{jobid, jdbcType=VARCHAR} and version= #{version, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
